details.test: Task 1: Add men’s black rectangular frame with blue-light filter to cart
Task 2: Book earliest exam on next Wednesday 10:00–14:00 at Downtown Clinic
Task 3: Save better of first two frames to wishlist based on rating then price
Task 4: Send holiday hours message including location hours row
Task 5: Insurance overview and benefits request for VisionCare Plus
Task 6: Add two different frames within price range and total budget to cart
Task 7: Start booking exam + glasses bundle exam after 15th
Task 8: Book contact lens fitting with contact lens specialist
Task 9: Subscribe to newsletter with eye health tips and new frame arrivals
